Summary: Replacing @reyna.aprilia's laptop keyboard, falling apart due to defective keycaps and silicon button.
Description:
- On October 13 2022, "A" key detached from the keyboard, i reported it to the IT team (Mas Gharim at that time) and it turned out that the button could be installed again.
- After a few days the "S" and "C" keys buttons also detached from keyboard when typing, but i was able to put them back on even though they wobbled when i used to type.
- In November 2022, "A" and "S" keys detached again. I've tried reinstalling "A" and "S" keys again but it doesn't work.
- On December 11 2023, the "I" key also detached but i could reinstall it, but when i used to type it was still wobbly.
- So from November 2022 - December 2023, more than a year, i typed without using the A and S keys, because there was silicon on them that i could press.
- On December 21, 2023 the silicone on the "A" key also detached so i could no longer use the letter A to type.
